name: Moo Grataem (Stir Fry Pork W/garlic)
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix pork with sauces, MSG, and black pepper until the pork is well coated.
2. Heat oil in a wok over medium heat.
3. Cook garlic for a few seconds.
4. Add the pork mixture and stir constantly.
5. Cook for 5-6 minutes.
6. Add green onions and cook for an additional 1-2 minutes.
7. Remove from heat and sprinkle with cilantro.
8. Serve over hot cooked rice and a bowl of clear soup.
Clear Soup:
1. In a large saucepan, boil 7 cups of water with one chicken breast for 15 minutes.
2. Simmer over low heat for 1 hour.
3. Remove the chicken from the bone and return it to the broth.
4. Add half a cup of sliced bamboo shoots, 1 teaspoon fish sauce, 1/2 teaspoon soy sauce, 1 tablespoon chopped green onions, optional MSG, optional black pepper, and cut up an endive leaf.
5. Cook for an additional 5 minutes.
